title: Neviti Christmas Craft Santa Glass Decorations - Pack of 10
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Co-ordinates with the other items in the Christmas Craft collection
description: Product Description Make your Christmas table extra special with these colourful glass decorations, featuring a cheery Santa design. Suitable for use with a variety of glassware, these colourful decorations sit on the rim of glasses for an extra touch of fun. Made from high-quality, durable card, these decorations are part of a full range of Christmas craft decorations, including everything you need to fill your home with colour this festive season. Box Contains 10 x Glass decorations - Santa
